# outputImage()

**Instance Method**

Returns the edited image.

## Declaration

```swift
func outputImage() -> NSImage!
```

## Return Value

The edited image.

## Getting and Setting Images

- **setInputImage(_:)**: Set the image input for the picture taker.
- **inputImage()**: Returns the  input  image associated with the picture taker.
